overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game, walking through a covered commercial walkway illuminated by yellow neon strips and digital advertisements. The scene transitions to an overlook of a foggy night cityscape with towering buildings before continuing through a busy corridor with food vending machines and pedestrians.

large glass panels on the left wall overlooking the city exterior

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered cyberpunk walkway with glowing yellow neon strips lining the edges. The corridor is enclosed with a low industrial ceiling and glass windows on the left revealing the dark foggy exterior. A pedestrian walks ahead on the left side along the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlook with view of foggy city

events.description: turns left to look out through glass windows at the foggy night cityscape
exterior fog diffuses the streetlights creating a soft glow around the Kabay building

agents.ego_description: stopped to look out the window at the atmospheric foggy city view

entered.detail: tall building with prominent red neon 'KABAY' signage visible through the fog
dense fog obscuring distant buildings with scattered neon lights
stylized tree with sparse foliage illuminated by spotlights below

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to observe the foggy night cityscape through the glass windows. The Kabay building dominates the view with its red neon signage piercing through the mist, accompanied by a decorative tree and streetlights creating a moody cyberpunk atmosphere.

events.description: turns back from window view to continue walking along the corridor
passes automated pizza vending machine with glowing red signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway, passing a pedestrian coming from the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction, passing by on the left side

entered.detail: red automated vending unit with 'ALL PIZZA' illuminated signage
large suspended digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the covered walkway, the scene returns to the enclosed corridor with glowing yellow neon strips. The camera passes various digital advertisements and a pizza vending machine, while encountering a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vending area with multiple automated machines

events.description: approaches cluster of Burrito XXL vending machines with pedestrians gathered
passes through group of pedestrians interacting with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy vending area, navigating past pedestrians browsing the machines

walking toward camera through the corridor

entered.detail: cluster of automated food dispensers with bright red 'BURRITO XXL' signage
red neon 'kabay' sign on the interior wall marking building entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a busier section of the walkway with moderate crowds gathered around food vending machines. Multiple pedestrians are seen interacting with the Burrito XXL automated stalls while others walk through the corridor. The Kabay interior sign glows red on the left wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial walkway that shifts from a quiet industrial corridor to a bustling urban hub. It begins by moving along a covered path lined with glowing yellow neon strips, passing a lone pedestrian beside glass windows that reveal a dark, foggy exterior. As the camera turns left, the view expands through the glass to a moody night cityscape where the red neon signage of the Kabay building pierces through the thick mist. The scene then returns to the enclosed walkway, gliding past digital advertisements and a pizza vending machine before encountering pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. Finally, the corridor opens into a busier section crowded with people interacting with Burrito XXL automated food stalls under the red glow of an interior Kabay sign.
